title: Develop a plan for a hydroponic system
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop a plan for a hydroponic system demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Carry out preliminary research

pcs.text: Research type of crop to be grown based on sound marketing principles
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research type of crop to be grown based on sound marketing principles?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research type of crop to be grown based on sound marketing principles.

pcs.text: Research the growing requirements of the crop based on sound horticultural practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research the growing requirements of the crop based on sound horticultural practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research the growing requirements of the crop based on sound horticultural practices.

pcs.text: Establish the associated risks of growing a particular crop based on sound horticultural practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish the associated risks of growing a particular crop based on sound horticultural practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish the associated risks of growing a particular crop based on sound horticultural practices.

pcs.text: Identify growing media to be utilised, and calculate estimated number or volume of growing media required for crop establishment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify growing media to be utilised, and calculate estimated number or volume of growing media required for crop establishment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify growing media to be utilised, and calculate estimated number or volume of growing media required for crop establishment.

pcs.text: Determine quantity of the plants to be grown based on a cost-benefit analysis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine quantity of the plants to be grown based on a cost-benefit analysis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine quantity of the plants to be grown based on a cost-benefit analysis.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Carry out preliminary research

elements.title: Assess the suitability of a site

pcs.text: Assess the physical characteristics of the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the physical characteristics of the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the physical characteristics of the site.

pcs.text: Ascertain and assess the proximity of the site to markets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ascertain and assess the proximity of the site to markets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ascertain and assess the proximity of the site to markets.

pcs.text: Identify local council, legislative and regulatory requirements in relation to the site and the development of a hydroponic farm
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify local council, legislative and regulatory requirements in relation to the site and the development of a hydroponic farm?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify local council, legislative and regulatory requirements in relation to the site and the development of a hydroponic farm.

pcs.text: Identify and consider the environmental implications of developing a hydroponic farm on the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and consider the environmental implications of developing a hydroponic farm on the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and consider the environmental implications of developing a hydroponic farm on the site.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assess the suitability of a site

elements.title: Select the required system

pcs.text: Research main types of hydroponic systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research main types of hydroponic systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research main types of hydroponic systems.

pcs.text: Carry out analysis on each type of system for the chosen crops
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out analysis on each type of system for the chosen crops?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out analysis on each type of system for the chosen crops.

pcs.text: Carry out a cost-benefit analysis on each system for each type of crop
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out a cost-benefit analysis on each system for each type of crop?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out a cost-benefit analysis on each system for each type of crop.

pcs.text: Determine the type of hydroponic system to be installed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the type of hydroponic system to be installed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the type of hydroponic system to be installed.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Select the required system

elements.title: Design the hydroponic system

pcs.text: Identify the benefits and disadvantages of a closed and open hydroponic system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the benefits and disadvantages of a closed and open hydroponic system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the benefits and disadvantages of a closed and open hydroponic system.

pcs.text: Select and document the water collection and storage system on the plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and document the water collection and storage system on the plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and document the water collection and storage system on the plan.

pcs.text: Select the irrigation system and its components according to the required volume of water and flow rate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select the irrigation system and its components according to the required volume of water and flow rate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select the irrigation system and its components according to the required volume of water and flow rate.

pcs.text: Select and document the fertigation system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and document the fertigation system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and document the fertigation system.

pcs.text: Determine the dimensions of the controlled environment structure following full consideration of the relevant factors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the dimensions of the controlled environment structure following full consideration of the relevant factors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the dimensions of the controlled environment structure following full consideration of the relevant factors.

pcs.text: Determine the environmental control system, and document specifications on the plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the environmental control system, and document specifications on the plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the environmental control system, and document specifications on the plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Design the hydroponic system

elements.title: Prepare and document the design

pcs.text: Develop a design plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a design plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a design plan.

pcs.text: Determine specifications and detailed costings, with the help of experts if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine specifications and detailed costings, with the help of experts if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine specifications and detailed costings, with the help of experts if required.

pcs.text: Develop and document detailed production procedures and schedules
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and document detailed production procedures and schedules?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and document detailed production procedures and schedules.

pcs.text: Present design documentation to the client for approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present design documentation to the client for approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present design documentation to the client for approval.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Prepare and document the design
